title: SHOWERS AND HYGIENE SERVICES - 211info
text: SUNNYSIDE METHODIST CHRUCH SHOWERS AND HYGIENE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers showers, clothing, laundry cards, toiletries, and other supplies when available. Also serves as a resource center to help people connect with services like identification, housing, detox, and more. 3520 SE Yamhill Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-5pm, Saturday 2pm-6pm Email (971) 202-1721 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 202-1721 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call for appointment, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1-5pm, Saturday 2-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 15, 14 and 75 stop within a few blocks of the building Services: Laundry Vouchers Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SUNNYSIDE METHODIST CHRUCH
